notice.title: Important notice
notice.description: Please read the terms of service below carefully before using our services. By continuing to use the services, you are deemed to have agreed to all of these terms.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
paragraphs: Welcome to our services. By accessing and using this website, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions set out below. If you do not agree with any term, please do not use our services.
These terms may be updated from time to time without prior notice. Continuing to use the services after changes are made means you accept the updated terms.

sections.title: 2. Our services
paragraphs: We provide a digital platform that allows users to:
items: Create accounts and manage personal information
Interact with other users in the community
Use the tools and features provided
sections.footer: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any service without prior notice.

sections.title: 3. User responsibilities
paragraphs: When using the services, you agree to:
items: Not use the services for illegal purposes
Not infringe the rights of others
Not upload harmful content, spam, or copyright-infringing material
Comply with applicable laws and regulations
sections.footer: Violating these rules may result in temporary account suspension or account deletion.

sections.title: 4. Privacy and security
paragraphs: We are committed to protecting your personal information:
items: Collect only the information needed to provide the services
Do not share information with unauthorized third parties
Comply with personal data protection regulations
sections.footer: For more details, please see our Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of liability
paragraphs: To the extent permitted by law:
items: The services are provided "as is" without warranties
We are not liable for indirect damages
Our liability is limited to the fees you have paid
We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free service operation
sections.footer: You use the services at your own risk.

sections.title: 6. Contact
paragraphs: If you have any questions about these terms, please contact us:
We will respond within 24-48 business hours.
